title: Metro Madrid Mod
description: A mod that adds Metro Madrid items, menus, a web panel, lights and remote redstone blocks
body:
**Metro Madrid Mod** is a **Fabric** mod for **1.20.1** that replicates (and expands) the **Madrid Metro** control system within Minecraft. It allows you to manage lighting and redstone networks by stations and groups, with a modern web panel designed for operators.

## Main features
- **Secure web panel:** login by username/password, detection of expired sessions, and blocking when the server has no world loaded.

- **Blocks:** Lights and redstone blocks that can be configured and switched with panel, button blocks and more...

- **Station and group management:** mass on/off, individual intensity, quick actions, and maintenance control (you can remove a station from the system with one click).
  
- **Timers and automations:** schedule recurring actions by station, group, or the entire network, with manual test execution and hourly summary.

- **Network diagnostics:** dedicated card with incidents (disabled groups, stations without metadata, orphaned links) and summary of lights/redstone on.
  
- **HUD and in-game utilities:** the “Metro Customizer” configurator assigns blocks to stations/groups and displays info on screen.

- **Alert system:** reports problems from commands or from the panel (resolution and notes on who is taking action).
  
- **Internal API:** persistence in JSON per world (metro_madrid.json, panel_credentials.json, panel_layout.json) so you can version the network or move it from server to server.
